simpleInterface.description: Clean design that gives you an organized experience and quick access to information.

rtlSupport.title: Full RTL and Arabic Support
rtlSupport.description: Content designed for Arabic with right alignment and natural flow.

hero.title: Save time and build your career path with AI-powered recruitment
hero.description: JobAI offers a modern Arabic experience that combines Elm's professionalism with the technical character of SaaS products, so you can find the right job and control the details of your path easily.

stats.fasterMatchingDesc: Faster in finding the best match

features.recommendationsDesc: Strengths, keywords, and best work sections.
features.inviteDesc: Experience smart search and accurate matching with job opportunities that match your professional profile.

services.title: Integrated Recruitment Tools for Every Stage
services.description: From CV analysis to job matching and creating a professional profile, everything in one place.

stats.jobSuggestionsDesc: Opportunities suitable for your professional style

insights.topCandidateDesc: AI Engineer for an opportunity in Riyadh with high interview rates.

why.title: Why JobAI?
points: Experience designed for Arabic and RTL from the beginning.
Simple design and organized interface to focus on the important.
AI automation that helps you in every step.

cta.title: Make Your Job Search Shorter and More Accurate
cta.description: Explore precise opportunities, develop your resume, and start your career journey with confidence with an interface designed for the most ambitious users.

login.title: Sign in to JobAI
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.

register.description: Join JobAI and start building your career.

errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check your credentials and try again.

descriptions.dashboard: See your CV, jobs, outreach, and interview progress in one place.
descriptions.cvs: Upload, review, and manage the CVs you use across analysis, jobs, and outreach.
descriptions.analyze: Run a fast ATS check and see what to fix next.
descriptions.improve: Rewrite weak sections and strengthen your CV fast.
descriptions.aiInterview: Practice with role-aware questions, score your answers, and improve before interviews.
descriptions.jobs: Find roles, check your fit, then move to analysis, interview, or send.
descriptions.send: Create outreach, send in batches, and track delivery.
descriptions.billing: Manage your plan, create a checkout, and review payment history.
descriptions.points: See your balance and top up when needed.
descriptions.profile: Keep your account details up to date.

upload.title: Add your CV
upload.description: Upload once, then use this CV across analysis, job matching, and smart sending.
upload.dropzoneHint: Or click to browse. PDF or DOCX · Max 10 MB.
upload.errorType: Only PDF and DOCX files are accepted.

list.emptyHint: Upload a PDF or DOCX file to get started.

preview.docxHint: DOCX files cannot be previewed in the browser — download to open in Word or Google Docs.

list.deleteConfirm:
